note: Company investor-relations landing page linking to current annual reporting and investor materials.

note: Air Products service page describing liquid nitrogen supply, storage, and dispensing equipment services.

note: Market-data source for APD trailing P/E ratio and other financial ratios around the May 2026 review date.

note: Secondary XBRL-based summary used to cross-check FY2025 revenue, net income, margin, and operating cash flow figures from the annual filing.

title: NREL 25-cm2 High-Pressure Low-Temperature Electrolysis Cell Hardware (Open Source)
note: Open-source electrolysis cell hardware design package relevant to decentralized hydrogen R&D and open hardware alternatives.

title: Open Source Hydrogen Generator
note: Open hardware concept page for a hydrogen generator, useful as an early-stage decentralized manufacturing signal and readiness constraint.

title: Open Source Microfactory
note: Open Source Ecology page describing local microfactory ambitions and distributed production framing relevant to industrial equipment decentralization.

title: O2 Open Oxygen
note: Open-source oxygen concentrator project documenting PSA concepts adjacent to small-scale air separation and nitrogen-removal hardware.

title: OxyHope Open Source Medical Grade Oxygen Concentrator
note: Open hardware oxygen concentrator project showing accessible documentation patterns for PSA-based air separation components.
